channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bernie Williams explains 'mixed emotions' for Yankees ditching no-facial hair policy
item.description: New York Yankees legend Bernie Williams reacted to the organization getting rid of a policy he had to abide by for years: no facial hair.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jose Mourinho banned for four matches and fined after Turkish referees comment
item.description: Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho has been given a four-match ban and fined by the Turkish Football Federation following his comments about Turkish referees after a match at Galatasaray on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 5 UConn claims 5th straight Big East regular-season title with 72-53 win over No. 22 Creighton
item.description: HARTFORD, Conn. (AP) — Sarah Strong had 22 points and nine rebounds and Paige Bueckers added 15 points, seven rebounds and seven assists as No. 5 UConn defeated No. 22 Creighton 72-53 on Thursday night and claimed its fifth straight Big East regular-season title.
item.dc:creator: JIM FULLER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Travis Kelce's podcast confirms his NFL return with nod to legendary 'Wolf of Wall Street' scene
item.description: Travis Kelce's "New Heights" podcast announced the tight end would return for another NFL season, posting a clip from "Wolf of Wall Street.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Leicester's slide continues in 2-0 loss to West Ham in Premier League
item.description: LONDON (AP) — West Ham handed relegation-threatened Leicester its fourth straight Premier League loss by beating Ruud van Nistelrooy's team 2-0 on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Aaron Rodgers dismissal created some mixed emotions among Jets players, coach Aaron Glenn says
item.description: Jets' All-Pro defensive lineman Quinnen Williams posted a thumbs-down emoji on social media in apparent show of disapproval of Aaron Rodgers' departure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark returning to Iowa for exhibition; tickets sell out in under an hour
item.description: Caitlin Clark will be playing an exhibition game with the Indiana Fever at her alma mater; tickets for the game at Iowa sold out in under an hour.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UConn's Dan Hurley misdirects criticism when asked about team's response to media's full-court press
item.description: The two-time national championship-winning coach's latest sparring match with the media was sparked by a question concerning UConn's handling of the press.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: what to know before you go
item.description: San Diego FC (SDFC) is expected to make history this Saturday, March 1, as the club hosts its inaugural home opener at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Japanese artist Murakami lends artwork to exclusive MLB collaboration ahead of Tokyo Series
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Takashi Murakami’s artwork has graced luxury goods from top fashion houses and album covers of superstar musicians. Now the famed contemporary Japanese artist has teamed with Major League Baseball for an exclusive merchandise collaboration to celebrate next month’s Tokyo Series.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Verstappen and Norris 'respect' each other while joking about their F1 rivalry
item.description: SAKHIR, Bahrain (AP) — Max Verstappen and Lando Norris dismissed suggestions their Formula 1 rivalry has become a personal feud, going so far as to joke on Thursday that they’d been reduced to brawling in a pub.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Aggies go cold in 82-65 loss at Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State saw a five-game winning streak over Boise State come to an end Wednesday night at ExtraMile Arena, falling to the Broncos in an 82-65 road battle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes lose to Arizona in Josh Eilert's debut, 83-66
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - It was nearly an impossible task for the Runnin' Utes Wednesday night in their first game under interim head coach Josh Eilert. In his first game since Craig Smith was fired, Eilert's Utes got blown out by #22 Arizona, 83-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Japan beats United States 2-1 for SheBelieves Cup women's soccer title
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Toko Koga scored early in the second half and Japan handed the United States its first loss under coach Emma Hayes with a 2-1 victory Wednesday night in the SheBelieves Cup title game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Super Bowl sports reporter found dead in hotel had sedative in his system: authorities
item.description: The woman accused of taking the reporter's phone and bank cards has previously been accused of drugging men to steal from them, according to investigators.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Hamilton, Fox 5

item.title: Maine lawmaker censured for posting picture of trans student on Facebook
item.description: (NewsNation) — A state representative in Maine was censured by other members of the legislature after posting a picture of a trans teen girl on her public Facebook page. The resolution passed 75-70 in a party-line vote, the Portland Press-Herald reported. Per Maine House rules, Republican Rep.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Cleveland Guardians owner Lawrence J. Dolan dies at 94
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lawrence J. Dolan, owner of Cleveland's Major League Baseball team since 2000, has died. He was 94. Dolan died Sunday night of natural causes, the Cleveland Guardians said Monday in a statement. “Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks organist works his last game after 33 seasons with the team
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks organist Frank Pellico worked his last game with the team on Sunday night after spending 33 seasons with the organization.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Alex Rodriguez makes half-court shot, wins Bucknell student $10,000
item.description: Former Major League Baseball star Alex Rodriguez showed his skill on the hardwood Sunday, making a half-court shot to win a Bucknell student $10,000.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kent Johnson scores 2 goals, the Blue Jackets beat the Blackhawks 5-1 to end a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Zach Werenski scored and had two assists and Kent Johnson scored twice for the Columbus Blue Jackets in a 5-1 victory against the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Booker, Durant and Beal help the Suns beat the Bulls to snap a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Devin Booker had 29 points and eight assists, Kevin Durant scored 27 points and Bradley Beal had 25 in his return to the starting lineup to help the Phoenix Suns beat the Chicago Bulls 121-117 on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
